segments.text: Wants to approach neutral with boomerang, cleanly using double jump to recover and chaining another boomerang
segments.original_text: ニュートラル外に出せブーメランと一緒に攻めていきたいが2段ジャンプきっちり使って上がった後もう1回ブーメランと複合

segments.text: Bombs and arrows combined to juggle, forcing the airdodge out of up B range
segments.original_text: 合わせて爆弾弓矢でジャグリングからの回避をさせて上B届かない位置

full_text: Wants to approach neutral with boomerang, cleanly using double jump to recover and chaining another boomerang Bombs and arrows combined to juggle, forcing the airdodge out of up B range
